description: A stylish, fashionable choice from Inc. 5. With it's sleek, feminine design this pair looks great with evening and party wear.  The high heel and strap shape are flattering to the foot.  This sandal will perfectly complement ethnic or Western evening dresses.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you pack easily when you travel.Heel: 2.5"UpperPatent footbed with textile footbed at toe, ergonomically curved and padded for absolute comfort and styleForefoot straps in synthetic textile which shines, has patent-look inner liningOutsoleDurable outsole with a shaped heel unitHorizontal grooves on midfoot and texturing on forefoot for excellent gripReinforced heel cap for heel durabilitySandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
